case_title: HOWARD CHAN VS. CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES
cause_of_action: WRITS OF MANDATE OR PROH., CERTI., ETC./ADMIN. AGEN

docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO DISMISS FOR FAILURE TO PROSECUTE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER CHAN, HOWARD TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID RESPONDENT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $335.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $335.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
